summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Flowtym Hotel PMS Design System refonte and Staff module improvements. All requested features are working correctly.
passed_tests: Frontend: Login flow works and redirects to /pms/planning dashboard
Frontend: Top navigation shows all modules (Flowboard, PMS, Channel, RMS, E-Reputation, CRM, Booking, Housekeeping, Staff, Maintenance, Finance, Rapports, API)
Frontend: Staff sub-navigation shows all tabs (Planning, Personnel, Contrats, Recrutement, Reporting, Configuration)
Frontend: Staff Planning page displays employee grid with Marie Dupont
Frontend: Staff Planning page has timeframe toggle (1 Semaine, 15 Jours, 1 Mois) - all functional
Frontend: Staff Planning page has legend for shift types (M, S, N, OFF, Repos, CP, MAL, F)
Frontend: Staff Planning page has H/MOIS column header
Frontend: Personnel page has Liste/Trombinoscope view toggle - both functional
Frontend: Personnel Liste view displays employees in table format with all columns (Collaborateur, Service, Poste, Contrat, Temps, Telephone, Email, Statut)
Frontend: Personnel Trombinoscope view displays employee cards in grid
Frontend: Clicking employee row/card opens detail modal
Frontend: Employee modal shows Contact, Informations RH, Documents sections
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{id}/staff/employees returns employee list (verified with auth token)
Design: Violet/purple accent color (#7c3aed / HSL 262 83% 58%) correctly applied
Design: White/light grey backgrounds correctly applied
Design: Contract badges (CDI, CDD, Extra) styled correctly
Design: Employee avatars with violet gradient styling
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: React key prop warning in StaffPlanning.jsx - changed <> to <React.Fragment key={...}>
seed_data_creation: Using existing test data: Marie Dupont employee in Hotel Test CP
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Staff module features are working correctly. Design system with violet/purple accent is properly implemented. Staff Planning has shift badges (M/S/N/OFF/Repos/CP/MAL/F), timeframe toggles, and H/MOIS column. Personnel page has Liste/Trombinoscope views with employee detail modal showing Contact, Informations RH, and Documents sections.

features_verified.design_system: Violet/purple accent (#7c3aed), white/light grey backgrounds, proper CSS variables
features_verified.top_navigation: All 13 modules visible with proper styling
features_verified.staff_sub_navigation: 6 tabs (Planning, Personnel, Contrats, Recrutement, Reporting, Configuration)
features_verified.staff_planning: Employee grid, timeframe toggle (7/15/30 days), shift legend, H/MOIS column
features_verified.personnel_liste: Table view with all columns and employee data
features_verified.personnel_trombinoscope: Card grid view with employee cards
features_verified.employee_modal: Contact, Informations RH, Documents sections with action buttons
